This pricing looks reasonable, but I need to make sure there aren't hidden costs for support or integration - we can't afford surprises in our healthcare budget.
They have good reviews, but I need to see if other healthcare organizations are actually using this successfully - testimonials from other industries won't cut it.
This interface looks complicated - if our clinical staff can't figure this out quickly, it's going to create more problems than it solves.

Finally, something that actually demonstrates reliable workflow capture without crashing - this could work for our patient care process documentation needs.
